title: Troubleshooting the "Set as Demo" Option Not Visible in the Developer Center

posts.author: Sowjanya49 (sowjanya B)
posts.cookedHtml:
Issue: “Set as Demo” Option Not Visible in Marketplace Demo Experience

Hello everyone,

I’m currently trying to set up a demo experience for my app using the steps outlined in the developer guide. Here’s what I’ve done so far:

  1. Navigated to the Developer Center.
  2. Selected my app and went to the Features tab.
  3. Clicked the three dots next to the workspace template app feature.

However, the “Set as demo” option is not visible or enabled.

Steps I’ve Taken:

  • Confirmed that I have the necessary permissions as a developer.
  • Checked that the app is published and live.
  • Ensured that the feature I’m working with is a workspace template.
  • Verified that I’ve opted into the marketplace demo feature as described in the guide.

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Sowjanya49,

Welcome to the community!

Just to verify - is your app listed in the marketplace? Do you mind sharing the app ID or listing page URL? (feel free to DM it to me)

Best,
Rachel

posts.author: Sowjanya49 (sowjanya B)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Rachel,

This is the App id : 10170276. Can you please guide us with the issue and can help us to make progress in App Listing.

Best,
Sowjanya

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Sowjanya49,

I’m having trouble finding your app in the marketplace. Did you previously submit it for review?

This feature only works for marketplace apps, so if your app isn’t in the marketplace, you won’t have access to it.

Best,
Rachel

posts.author: Sowjanya49 (sowjanya B)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Rachel,
As per previous replies, our app is not yet listed in the marketplace. We need your guidance because we are unable to find the “Set a Demo” button in the features section.
Here is the App Listing URL : https://marketplaceapps.monday.com/boards/7385469990
Please refer to the above link and guide us for the same. Can you help us with this information provided.
If anything else needed please let us know.
Regards,
Sowjanya
